title: Delhi High Court dismisses Lalu Yadav's plea to quash CBI FIR in land-for-jobs case
description: Justice Ravinder Dudeja dismissed the petition by Mr. Yadav, a former Railway Minister and ex-Chief Minister of Bihar, that also sought quashing of the three chargesheets filed in 2022, 2023 and 2024 and the subsequent orders of cognisance in the matter.
